summary: Iteration 139 - Brain 100 KPI Metrics Fix Validation. ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend /api/brain/runtime-check returns catalog_metric_count=100 and resolves the JSON catalog from /app/backend/business_brain_top100_catalog.json. /api/brain/metrics?include_coverage=true returns total_metrics=100. Frontend Advisor page correctly shows 'syncing' state during Brain load (not false unavailable or all-clear). Login with provided credentials works.

advisor_no_false_red_unavailable_state.findings: Advisor page does NOT show red 'Brain unavailable' state by default while Brain is loading/pending. UI correctly displays 'Business Brain is syncing live sources. Priority decisions will appear when this cycle completes.'

advisor_shows_syncing_not_all_clear.findings: Advisor page shows syncing state instead of false all-clear card while Brain source health is pending/loading

login_with_credentials.findings: Login via /api/auth/supabase/login with andre@thestrategysquad.com.au / MasterMind2025* works correctly, redirects to /advisor

catalog_file_validation.findings: business_brain_top100_catalog.json exists at /app/backend/, contains exactly 100 metrics with unique IDs 1-100

critical_code_review_comments: Portable path resolution in _metric_catalog_candidates() correctly uses Path(__file__).resolve().parent to find catalog relative to module
sourceHealth initial state correctly sets brain.status='pending' to prevent false unavailable state on first render
brainLoading condition properly checks authState, integrationContextLoading, AND sourceHealth.brain.status==='pending'
brainUnavailable is gated by !brainLoading to prevent showing red error while still syncing
context_for_next_testing_agent: 100 KPI metrics fix validated. Brain runtime-check and metrics endpoints return 100 metrics. Advisor page UI correctly shows syncing state during Brain load. Catalog file at /app/backend/business_brain_top100_catalog.json is the authoritative source with 100 metrics. Previous iteration issues with Soundboard AI chat (503 due to placeholder AI keys) remain unrelated to this fix.

previous_issue.root_cause: Production Azure deployment copies backend/ contents into /app root, so /app/backend/business_brain_top100_catalog.json was not found at expected path, causing fallback to CORE_METRICS_FALLBACK with only 20 metrics
previous_issue.fix_applied: Added portable path resolution using Path(__file__).resolve().parent in _metric_catalog_candidates() function, plus additional candidate paths including /app/business_brain_top100_catalog.json
previous_issue.verification: Preview now correctly resolves catalog at /app/backend/business_brain_top100_catalog.json with 100 metrics

ui_issue.root_cause: Advisor page was showing red 'Brain unavailable' state or false 'all-clear' card while Brain sourceHealth was still pending/loading
ui_issue.fix_applied: sourceHealth.brain initial state set to status='pending', brainLoading includes check for status==='pending', brainUnavailable gated by !brainLoading
ui_issue.verification: Advisor page now correctly shows 'Business Brain is syncing live sources' during initial load instead of false error or all-clear states
